# ZELEX Character Profiles — by Series & Body Type

*Generated by `scripts/build_profiles.py`. Each body is analyzed on its spec-card
measurements and mapped to one of the 7 Body Families from the CEO brief.*

**Metrics:** WHR = waist÷hip (lower = more hourglass). BWR = bust÷waist (higher = more bust-forward).
Bust drop = upper−under bust (cup volume proxy).


## K-Series

| Body | H/cup | Wt | Bust·Waist·Hip | WHR | BWR | Body Family | Silhouette |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **ZK159D** | 159cm D | 33.8kg | 87·60.5·97 | 0.624 | 1.438 | The Icon *(near)* | Glamour model |
| **ZK168B** | 168cm B | 37.5kg | 78·63·97 | 0.649 | 1.238 | The Muse *(near)* | Tall, hip-dominant |

### ZK159D — The Companion
*The one you can actually live with.*

- **Body Family:** The Icon (Glamour model) · premium +30%
- **Signature:** 159cm, D-cup, 33.8kg · bust 87 / waist 60.5 / hip 97 · WHR 0.624, BWR 1.438, drop 18cm
- **Target buyer:** Photographer / curator
- **Energy:** Warm · approachable · low-maintenance · solo-manageable
- **Positioning:** Lightest in the lineup at 33.8kg with a true hourglass (WHR 0.62) and a generous D drop. The apartment-friendly entry to premium — Sora/Suyeon's body in the K-Series brief. First-time premium buyer who fears 'too much doll.'

### ZK168B — The Gallery Muse
*Restraint as a flex.*

- **Body Family:** The Muse (Tall, hip-dominant) · premium +25%
- **Signature:** 168cm, B-cup, 37.5kg · bust 78 / waist 63 / hip 97 · WHR 0.649, BWR 1.238, drop 12cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer
- **Energy:** Tall · restrained · editorial · quietly confident
- **Positioning:** 168cm with a deliberately understated B-cup and long-leg geometry — the 'gallery aesthetic' body the brief assigns to Lian/Mira/Zhen. For the buyer who reads bust-forward as loud and chooses proportion over volume.

### ZG162D — The Girl Next Door
*Believable before she's beautiful.*

- **Body Family:** The Muse (Tall, hip-dominant) · premium +25%
- **Signature:** 162cm, D-cup, 33.5kg · bust 85 / waist 61.5 / hip 93.5 · WHR 0.658, BWR 1.382, drop 17.5cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer
- **Energy:** Balanced · believable · soft · familiar
- **Positioning:** The most 'normal' real-world build in Inspiration (162cm D, balanced WHR 0.66). Realism-first Western buyer who wants relatable over fantasy. The safe hero SKU for the new-user funnel.

### ZGX165F — The Pinup
*All curve, no apology.*

- **Body Family:** The Muse (Tall, hip-dominant) · premium +25%
- **Signature:** 165cm, F-cup, 39.9kg · bust 89 / waist 64 / hip 96.5 · WHR 0.663, BWR 1.391, drop 21.5cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer
- **Energy:** Curvy · plush · retro-glamour · full-figured
- **Positioning:** Fullest Inspiration body (F-cup, 21.5cm drop, 39.9kg). The ZGX 'X' platform — plush volume on a mid-height frame. Body-positivity and classic-curves buyer.

### ZG170C — The Editorial
*Built for the lens, not the room.*

- **Body Family:** The Muse (Tall, hip-dominant) · premium +25%
- **Signature:** 170cm, C-cup, 36.1kg · bust 87.5 / waist 64.5 / hip 94 · WHR 0.686, BWR 1.357, drop 16.0cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer
- **Energy:** Lean · elongated · runway · cool
- **Positioning:** Tall (170cm) and the leanest WHR-high build (0.69) with a modest C. Photographer / Instagram-curator buyer — long lines, clean silhouette, camera-first.

### ZG170D — The Hourglass
*The full figure, at full height.*

- **Body Family:** The Muse (Tall, hip-dominant) · premium +25%
- **Signature:** 170cm, D-cup, 39.7kg · bust 87 / waist 67.5 / hip 103 · WHR 0.655, BWR 1.289, drop 18cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer
- **Energy:** Statuesque · hip-dominant · commanding · classic
- **Positioning:** 170cm with the widest hip in Inspiration (103cm) and the strongest hourglass pull. For the buyer who wants tall AND curvy — no compromise between height and shape.

### ZG175E — The Supermodel
*Six feet of presence.*

- **Body Family:** The Muse (Tall, hip-dominant) · premium +25%
- **Signature:** 175cm, E-cup, 38kg · bust 88.5 / waist 65.5 / hip 96.5 · WHR 0.679, BWR 1.351, drop 19.5cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer
- **Energy:** Amazonian · long · dramatic · high-fashion
- **Positioning:** Tallest in the catalog (175cm, E-cup). The statement piece — high-fashion proportions for the collector who wants maximum stature and reach. Premium anchor of the Inspiration line.

- **Signature:** 161cm, D-cup, 35kg · bust 85 / waist 62 / hip 94 · WHR 0.66, BWR 1.371, drop 18cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer

### ZF168B — The Minimalist
*Less doll, more presence.*

- **Body Family:** The Muse (Tall, hip-dominant) · premium +25%
- **Signature:** 168cm, B-cup, 39kg · bust 80 / waist 64 / hip 98 · WHR 0.653, BWR 1.25, drop 13cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer
- **Energy:** Clean · natural · understated · modern
- **Positioning:** Fusion's lean B-cup build with movable-jaw realism. For the buyer who prioritizes lifelike feel and natural proportion over volume — the 'quiet luxury' Fusion entry.

### ZF169C — The Naturalist
*Real where it counts.*

- **Body Family:** The Muse (Tall, hip-dominant) · premium +25%
- **Signature:** 169cm, C-cup, 39kg · bust 88.5 / waist 68.5 / hip 102 · WHR 0.672, BWR 1.292, drop 15.5cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer
- **Energy:** Soft · realistic · warm · lived-in
- **Positioning:** 169cm C-cup Fusion in tan — balanced, naturalistic, movable jaw. The realism-forward Fusion hero for buyers crossing over from the Inspiration line.

### ZX153B — The Muse
- **Body Family:** The Muse (Tall, hip-dominant) · premium +25%
- **Signature:** 153cm, B-cup, 28kg · bust 75 / waist 53 / hip 79 · WHR 0.671, BWR 1.415, drop 11cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer

### ZX160J — The Fantasy
*Pure imagination, made physical.*

- **Body Family:** The Siren (Bust-dominant fantasy) · premium +35%
- **Signature:** 160cm, J-cup, 37.2kg · bust 88.5 / waist 51.5 / hip 101.5 · WHR 0.507, BWR 1.718, drop 32.5cm
- **Target buyer:** Character / anime crossover
- **Energy:** Explosive curves · tiny waist · gravity-defying · maximal
- **Positioning:** SLE 3.0 J-cup on a compact 160cm frame — extreme bust-to-waist (32.5cm drop, WHR 0.51). Character/anime-crossover and fantasy-build buyer. The SLE line's headline silhouette.

### ZX163E — The Icon
- **Body Family:** The Icon (Glamour model) · premium +30%
- **Signature:** 163cm, E-cup, 31kg · bust 85 / waist 58 / hip 92 · WHR 0.63, BWR 1.466, drop 19cm
- **Target buyer:** Photographer / curator

### ZX164G — The Empress
*More of everything, on purpose.*

- **Body Family:** The Empress (Maximum plush) · premium +40%
- **Signature:** 164cm, G-cup, 33.8kg · bust 88.5 / waist 55.5 / hip 100.5 · WHR 0.552, BWR 1.595, drop 24.5cm
- **Target buyer:** Body-positivity collector
- **Energy:** Abundant · soft-dominant · plush · regal
- **Positioning:** Maximum-plush SLE build (G-cup, full hips). Body-positivity collector who wants abundance with proportion. The 'curvy queen' of the SLE 3.0 range.

### ZX165D — The Classic SLE
*The SLE everyone starts with.*

- **Body Family:** The Icon (Glamour model) · premium +30%
- **Signature:** 165cm, D-cup, 33.3kg · bust 82 / waist 53 / hip 98 · WHR 0.541, BWR 1.547, drop 18.5cm
- **Target buyer:** Photographer / curator
- **Energy:** Glamour · hourglass · photogenic · poised
- **Positioning:** Cleanest hourglass in SLE 3.0 (165cm D, WHR 0.54, Icon family). The accessible, photogenic entry into the SLE volume line — broad appeal, camera-ready.

### ZX166K — The Maximalist
*The biggest statement we make.*

- **Body Family:** The Siren (Bust-dominant fantasy) · premium +35%
- **Signature:** 166cm, K-cup, 33.8kg · bust 94 / waist 54 / hip 90.5 · WHR 0.597, BWR 1.741, drop 34.5cm
- **Target buyer:** Character / anime crossover
- **Energy:** Extreme · top-heavy · show-stopping · unapologetic
- **Positioning:** Largest cup in the catalog (K-cup, 94cm bust on a 54cm waist). The extreme-fantasy flagship — for the buyer who wants the most dramatic build SLE can produce.

### ZX170A — The Runway
*Sleek, tall, and deliberately understated.*

- **Body Family:** The Muse (Tall, hip-dominant) · premium +25%
- **Signature:** 170cm, A-cup, 36.0kg · bust 82 / waist 65 / hip 97 · WHR 0.67, BWR 1.262, drop 10cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer
- **Energy:** Lean · athletic · long · minimal
- **Positioning:** 170cm A-cup — the leanest, most athletic SLE build (tapered, realism-first). Discreet buyer who wants height and slim proportion over volume. The anti-Maximalist.

### ZX171C — The Statuesque
*Height with restraint.*

- **Body Family:** The Muse (Tall, hip-dominant) · premium +25%
- **Signature:** 171cm, C-cup, 35.6kg · bust 83 / waist 61 / hip 95.5 · WHR 0.639, BWR 1.361, drop 15.5cm
- **Target buyer:** European aesthetic buyer
- **Energy:** Tall · balanced · elegant · versatile
- **Positioning:** 171cm C-cup SLE 3.0 — tall and proportionally balanced. The versatile mid-point of the SLE range; broad-appeal stature without extremes.

### ZX172E — The Showstopper
*The top of the SLE range, in every sense.*

- **Body Family:** The Icon (Glamour model) · premium +30%
- **Signature:** 172cm, E-cup, 35.7kg · bust 86.5 / waist 57.5 / hip 94.5 · WHR 0.608, BWR 1.504, drop 19.5cm
- **Target buyer:** Photographer / curator
- **Energy:** Tallest · dramatic · full · commanding
- **Positioning:** Tallest SLE build (172cm E-cup, Icon family). Premium SLE 3.0 anchor — maximum stature with a full, photogenic figure. The SLE collector's statement piece.
